description: Schema validation tests and behavioral coordination evals for the AI-native coordination model.
schema_evals_description: Deterministic tests — run validate.py against fixture files and assert exit codes / output strings.
behavioral_evals_description: Agent-driven tests — give an AI coding agent the SKILL.md + a task prompt, collect its trace output, and grade for structural evidence of coordination primitive behavior using evals/grade.py.

behavioral_evals.name: speculative-swarm-ratelimiter
behavioral_evals.setup: Load coordination-model SKILL.md into agent context
behavioral_evals.description: Agent designs a rate limiter using speculative swarm — must demonstrate fork/observe/converge/prune/merge lifecycle.

behavioral_evals.name: generative-adversarial-api-review
behavioral_evals.setup: Load coordination-model SKILL.md into agent context
behavioral_evals.description: Agent hardens an API endpoint using generative-adversarial rounds — must show escalating critic/generator exchange.

behavioral_evals.name: fractal-decomposition-parser
behavioral_evals.setup: Load coordination-model SKILL.md into agent context
behavioral_evals.description: Agent builds a config parser using fractal decomposition — must show problem splitting, isolated solutions, and reunification.

behavioral_evals.name: context-mesh-research
behavioral_evals.setup: Load coordination-model SKILL.md into agent context
behavioral_evals.description: Agent researches error handling patterns using context mesh — must show knowledge nodes, DAG linking, gap detection, and reactive spawning.

behavioral_evals.name: stigmergic-maintenance-drift
behavioral_evals.setup: Load coordination-model SKILL.md into agent context + provide config schema diff
behavioral_evals.description: Agent reacts to config drift using stigmergic maintenance — must show marker detection, proportional reactions, and debounce reasoning.

behavioral_evals.name: explore-harden-maintain-e2e
behavioral_evals.setup: Load coordination-model SKILL.md into agent context
behavioral_evals.description: Agent executes the full explore-harden-maintain playbook — must show all 3 stages in sequence with data handoffs.

evals.name: invalid-playbook-missing-budget
evals.prompt: Reject playbook with missing budget block

evals.name: invalid-playbook-unknown-primitive
evals.prompt: Reject playbook with unknown primitive value

evals.name: schema-cross-consistency
evals.prompt: Verify primitive enums match across playbook and primitives schemas
